# Bevox

Bevox is Business Evolution X: a company that designs and builds digital systems, connected operations, AI automation, and custom software.

## Website
https://bevox.co/

## Authority
- Business Evolution Framework: https://bevox.co/business-evolution/framework
- Evolution Hub: https://bevox.co/evolution-hub
- Work: https://bevox.co/work

## Core Services
- AI Automation
- Business Systems
- Custom Software
- AI Agents
- Integrations
- Dashboards
- Workflow Automation

## Positioning
Bevox helps companies reduce repetitive work, connect disconnected tools, improve operational visibility, and build scalable internal systems.
